summary: Decompiled and matched the sysdolphin baselib HSD fog module, replacing asm/sysdolphin/baselib/fog.s with src/sysdolphin/baselib/fog.c and wiring obj_files.mk to build the C object. The PR introduced fog structs/descriptors/prototypes in fog.h, added/refactored common HSD object reference-count helpers in object.h, tightened GX fog function declarations, and propagated newly identified fog symbol names through remaining asm/C callsites. Review focused on cleaning up autogenerated local names, using project struct offset comment style, and moving ref_DEC-style helpers to object.h because they belong to the object subsystem.
what_changed: Deleted the 757-line asm implementation asm/sysdolphin/baselib/fog.s and added a matched 247-line C implementation at src/sysdolphin/baselib/fog.c.
Changed obj_files.mk from building asm/sysdolphin/baselib/fog.s.o to building src/sysdolphin/baselib/fog.c.o.

Expanded include/sysdolphin/baselib/fog.h from a single HSD_FogSet(s32) declaration into typed HSD_Fog, HSD_FogAdj, HSD_FogDesc, HSD_FogAdjDesc, HSD_FogInfo, and HSD_FogAdjInfo definitions plus fog function prototypes.

Implemented HSD_FogSet, HSD_FogAlloc, HSD_FogLoadDesc, HSD_FogInit, HSD_FogAdjAlloc, HSD_FogAdjLoadDesc, HSD_FogAdjInit, HSD_FogReqAnim, HSD_FogReqAnimByFlags, HSD_FogInterpretAnim, FogUpdateFunc, FogRelease, FogInfoInit, and FogAdjInfoInit in C.

HSD_FogSet now uses HSD_CObjGetCurrent, HSD_CObjGetNear/Far, GXSetFog, GXGetViewportv, GXGetProjectionv, GXInitFogAdjTable, and GXSetFogRangeAdj to implement fog and range-adjustment behavior, including default/null fog handling.
Added HSD object reference-count helpers iref_CNT, ref_CNT, ref_DEC, and iref_DEC to include/sysdolphin/baselib/object.h and changed HSD_OBJ_NOREF to ((u16) -1).
Removed duplicated inline reference-count helper definitions from src/sysdolphin/baselib/jobj.c after moving them to object.h.
Updated src/dolphin/gx/GX_unknown_001.h fog-related declarations to use GXColor, Mtx44Ptr, and struct _GXFogAdjTbl* instead of looser pointer/unknown types.

Renamed many remaining asm callsites from autogenerated fog function names to real symbols: func_8037DC38 became HSD_FogLoadDesc, func_8037DED0 became HSD_FogReqAnim, and func_8037DF2C became HSD_FogInterpretAnim.
Updated ground.c's asm wrapper declaration and branch annotation to call HSD_FogLoadDesc rather than func_8037DC38.
smart_moves: Converted the object file switch in obj_files.mk in the same PR as the C implementation, making the asm deletion/build replacement explicit and easy to audit.
Kept broad callsite renaming in asm files limited to symbol labels only, preserving bytes while making future decompilation searches understand fog semantics.
Used a local GXFogAdjTbl typedef and updated GX prototypes so fog range-adjustment calls are typed around the actual data shape rather than opaque s32*/unk_t placeholders.
Handled both explicit descriptor initialization and default viewport-derived initialization paths for HSD_Fog and HSD_FogAdj, preserving behavior visible in the asm.
Moved generic ref-count helpers into object.h instead of leaving fog-local or jobj-local copies, which reduced duplication and made FogRelease able to share the object subsystem helper.
Responded to review by replacing autogenerated local names with more meaningful names such as tbl, range, proj, and v, improving readability without disturbing matching.
decomp_lessons: When a decompiled baselib module exposes common utility logic, place that logic in the owning subsystem header; review explicitly identified ref_DEC as an object.c/object.h concern rather than a fog.c concern.

After matching a module, immediately rename all known external asm callsites to the new function names. This creates a repository-wide semantic map for future decomp work without requiring those callers to be decompiled yet.
Headers for matched modules should define the runtime object struct, descriptor struct, class-info struct, and public prototypes together so remaining asm/C users can converge on typed APIs.
Use the project-preferred struct member comment format `/* 0xoffset */ type member;`; review requested this for fog.h.

GX and math prototypes often need to be tightened as modules are matched. In this PR, matching fog required GXSetFog to take GXColor, GXInitFogAdjTable to take Mtx44Ptr, and GXSetFogRangeAdj to take a fog-adjustment table pointer.
Reviewer comments show that FRAY labels can provide actual names for autogenerated locals/symbols, but those names should still be cleaned up into source-readable identifiers where appropriate.
Project style around struct comment placement was known to be mixed at the time; the discussion was tracked separately in issue #557 rather than fully resolved inside this PR.
naming_conventions: Real HSD fog APIs use the HSD_Fog prefix: HSD_FogSet, HSD_FogLoadDesc, HSD_FogReqAnim, HSD_FogInterpretAnim, HSD_FogReqAnimByFlags.
Fog adjustment APIs and types use the HSD_FogAdj prefix: HSD_FogAdj, HSD_FogAdjDesc, HSD_FogAdjInfo, HSD_FogAdjLoadDesc, HSD_FogAdjInit.
Class info globals follow lower camel HSD baselib style: hsdFog and hsdFogAdj.
Class initializer statics use subsystem names: FogInfoInit and FogAdjInfoInit.
Struct definitions use the `_HSD_Name` tag form with typedef alias `HSD_Name`, matching existing HSD header style.
Struct member offset comments should use `/* 0x00 */ type member;` rather than trailing `// 0x00` comments.
Avoid leaving compiler/decompiler autogenerated locals such as var_r31/spXX in final matched C when better names are known; this PR used names such as tbl, range, proj, mtx, and v.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Deleted the matched asm file and replaced it with C while preserving the same object slot in obj_files.mk.
Left many still-asm callers intact but changed only branch target labels to named fog functions, a low-risk semantic annotation tactic.

Used stack/local shapes that mirror GX APIs: a 6-float viewport array from GXGetViewportv, a projection struct with x0 plus six floats from GXGetProjectionv, and a stack Mtx44 for derived projection matrices.
Kept exact assert/panic line evidence in C, including HSD_Panic at line 0x4D and assert_line calls at 0x8C, 0x99, 0xD6, and 0xE6.
Matched fog range clamping explicitly to 0..640 before GXSetFogRangeAdj.
Used HSD_AObjInterpretAnim with FogUpdateFunc and switched animation field IDs to update fog start/end/color channels and fog_adj center.
Preserved an uncertain symbol as `func_8037DE7C` with a source comment `// HSD_FogAddAnim ?`, showing restraint where evidence for the final name was not strong.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: Correct struct comments to the `/* 0xoffset */ type var;` style.
review_feedback.outcome: Final diff uses offset comments before fog.h struct members.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: Rename autogenerated names for cleanup; reviewer noted actual names were labeled in FRAY.
review_feedback.outcome: Final fog.c uses cleaner names such as tbl, range, proj, mtx, and v instead of spXX/var_rXX-style locals.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: `ref_DEC` is an object.c function and should be moved there.
review_feedback.outcome: Common ref-count helpers were added to object.h and removed from jobj.c; FogRelease calls ref_DEC from the shared object helper.

review_feedback.author: review discussion
review_feedback.feedback: Struct comment style was mixed across the codebase; this broader inconsistency should be handled separately.
review_feedback.outcome: Tracked in issue #557 according to the PR comments.

review_feedback.author: r-burns
review_feedback.feedback: Author reported: `Okay, all comments should be addressed now :)`.
review_feedback.outcome: PR was merged the same day.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename func_8037DE7C or confirm whether it is HSD_FogAddAnim.
Search for issue #557 or later style cleanup PRs about struct offset comment conventions.
Find PRs that further type GX_unknown_001.h or replace temporary GX fog declarations with official Dolphin SDK names.
Search for additional modules that moved ref-count helpers from local C files into object.h after this PR.
Find future decomp PRs that use HSD_FogDesc or HSD_FogAdjDesc to decompile stage/menu fog-loading callsites.
